# Database, Length, Validation, and Value Errors | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CKTool JS ](/documentation/cktooljs)

- [ Database, Length, Validation, and Value Errors ](/documentation/CKToolJS/database-length-validation-and-value-errors)

-  Database, Length, Validation, and Value Errors 

API Collection# Database, Length, Validation, and Value Errors

## [Topics](/documentation/CKToolJS/database-length-validation-and-value-errors#topics)

### [Database Errors](/documentation/CKToolJS/database-length-validation-and-value-errors#Database-Errors)

[`AuthenticationRequiredError`](/documentation/cktooljs/authenticationrequirederror)An object that represents an error that occurs when authentication information is missing for the current user.[`CKDBBatchDeleteError`](/documentation/cktooljs/ckdbbatchdeleteerror)An object that represents an error that may occur when deleting a resource as part of a batch delete operation.[`RequestError`](/documentation/cktooljs/requesterror)An object that represents a general error from the service.### [Length Errors](/documentation/CKToolJS/database-length-validation-and-value-errors#Length-Errors)

[`LengthError`](/documentation/cktooljs/lengtherror)The base class of length-related validation errors.[`LengthGreaterThanMaxError`](/documentation/cktooljs/lengthgreaterthanmaxerror)An error a validator emits when the length property of the value given is greater than the allowed maximum.[`LengthLessThanMinError`](/documentation/cktooljs/lengthlessthanminerror)An error a validator emits when the length property of the value given is less than the allowed minimum.[`LengthNotNumericError`](/documentation/cktooljs/lengthnotnumericerror)An error a validator emits when the length property of a value isn’t numeric.### [Validation Errors](/documentation/CKToolJS/database-length-validation-and-value-errors#Validation-Errors)

[`ValidationError`](/documentation/cktooljs/validationerror)The base class of errors emitted when validators fail validation.[`ArrayError`](/documentation/cktooljs/arrayerror)An error an array validator emits when an array’s elements fail validation.[`MaxValueNotNumericError`](/documentation/cktooljs/maxvaluenotnumericerror)An error a validator emits when the maximum value given isn’t numeric.[`MinValueNotNumericError`](/documentation/cktooljs/minvaluenotnumericerror)An error a validator emits when the minimum value given isn’t numeric.[`ValueIsRequiredError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valueisrequirederror)The error emitted when a value is required but a validator determines the value is not present.[`ValueNotConvertibleToTypeError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotconvertibletotypeerror)The base class of errors related to type validation or coercion.[`ValueNotFunctionError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotfunctionerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a function.[`ValueNotArrayBufferError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotarraybuffererror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t an `ArrayBuffer`.[`ValueNotArrayError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotarrayerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t an array.[`ValueNotBase64StringError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotbase64stringerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a `Base64` string or isn’t castable to that type.[`ValueNotBlobError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotbloberror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a `Blob`.[`ValueNotBooleanError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotbooleanerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a Boolean or isn’t castable to that type.[`ValueNotByteArrayError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotbytearrayerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a `ByteArray` or isn’t castable to that type.[`ValueNotByteError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotbyteerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a `Byte` or isn’t castable to that type.[`ValueNotDateError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotdateerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a `Date` or isn’t castable to that type.[`ValueNotDateStringError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotdatestringerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a date string.[`ValueNotDoubleError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotdoubleerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a `Double` or isn’t castable to that type.[`ValueNotEnumValueError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotenumvalueerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a valid enumeration value.[`ValueNotFloatError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotfloaterror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a `Float` or isn’t castable to that type.[`ValueNotInt32Error`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotint32error)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t an `Int32` or isn’t castable to that type.[`ValueNotInt64Error`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotint64error)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t an `Int64` or isn’t castable to that type.[`ValueNotJsonError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotjsonerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t JSON.[`ValueNotNumericError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotnumericerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t numeric.[`ValueNotObjectError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotobjecterror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t an object.[`ValueNotStringError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotstringerror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a string.[`ValueNotUuidError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotuuiderror)An error a validator emits when a value isn’t a `Uuid` or isn’t castable to that type.[`ValueTypeNotRecognizedError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuetypenotrecognizederror)An error that a deserializer emits when it fails to recognize the type of object to deserialize or process.### [Value Range Errors](/documentation/CKToolJS/database-length-validation-and-value-errors#Value-Range-Errors)

[`ValueRangeError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuerangeerror)The base class of range-related validation errors.[`ValueGreaterThanMaxNumberError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuegreaterthanmaxnumbererror)An error a validator emits when a given value is greater than the allowed maximum.[`ValueLessThanMinNumberError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuelessthanminnumbererror)An error a validator emits when a given value is less than the allowed minimum.[`ValueNotInNumberRangeError`](/documentation/cktooljs/valuenotinnumberrangeerror)An error a validator emits when a value can’t be represented by a JavaScript number due to being outside of the representable range.## [See Also](/documentation/CKToolJS/database-length-validation-and-value-errors#see-also)

### [Errors](/documentation/CKToolJS/database-length-validation-and-value-errors#Errors)

[`ErrorBase`](/documentation/cktooljs/errorbase)The base class of any error emitted by functions in the client library.
title: Database, Length, Validation, and Value Errors | Apple Developer Documentation
